_doc: Fresh, uninitialized copy. On the first session, CLAUDE.md §0 routes to /setup then /onboarding, which fill this in and set initialized=true. Do not teach until then.

review_tracking._doc: Maintained by /review and read by the Consolidation Gate (review/CONSOLIDATION-GATE.md) to decide REVIEW vs LEARN.

media._doc: Set during /setup. enabled=false means NotebookLM media is off (the tutor still works fully). Never hardcode the notebook id elsewhere — resolve via `notebooklm list`.
